resources.string:
"Bujit is a personal budgeting tool for informational purposes only. " "It does not constitute financial advice.

Displayed balances may not reflect real-time account data. " "Bank account data is accessed securely via Plaid, a third-party service." "

Balance projections are estimates and should not be relied upon for financial decisions. " "Users are themselves responsible for verifying all financial information and making informed decisions." "

You may find Plaid's legal and privacy information and this disclaimer in the settings menu."
